notes: Spark structured streaming end-to-end via SASL/PLAIN with OCI auth token. 3 test messages produced via `oci streaming stream message put` were consumed by spark.readStream.format('kafka').load() in 25 sec. Username format `oaseceal/oracleidentitycloudservice/ahmed.shahzad.awan@oracle.com/<stream_pool_ocid>` matches OCI Streaming Kafka SASL spec for IAM-Domains tenancies. Checkpoint path /Volumes/default/default/stability_test_vol/... — confirms the skill's mandate that streaming checkpoints must live under /Volumes/, not /tmp/ (JVM perm denied) or /Workspace/ (FUSE silent fail).
